meaning: 怀特霍斯[加拿大西北部城市](育空地区首府)
examples: Next day, in Whitehorse, I meet up with the rest of the group - three big guys from Manitoba, a couple of mums, some sensible teenagers.
The best of these yappers will be off on The Quest this winter - a 1, 000-mile race from Fairbanks, Alaska, across the frozen wastes down to Whitehorse.
There is the option to go on a day trip to Skagway in Alaska with the White Pass & Yukon Railway Company (based on availability) or spend the day on your own in and around Whitehorse.
WhiteHorse will operate as a business-development corporation focused on secured loans to middle-market companies.
Capital acquired WhiteHorse Capital, a Dallas-based CLO manager, in October 2011 to expand middle-market investing.
